title: AI Status Detection & Universal Filtering
changes: Implemented AI-based Tender Status Detection (feat-073) for automatic 'Open/Closed' classification.
Introduced the Universal Status Filter across Dashboard and Sourcing Workbench.
Added 'Contract Info' Admin view for manual status reclassification and data verification.
Localized filter controls and status badges in English and German.
Synchronized Production Azure SQL schema with latest architectural requirements.

title: Hotfix: Force Staging Auth (Retry)
changes: Temporarily forced Staging Authentication logic on Production to resolve Azure AD configuration issues.
Users will be automatically logged in as Administrator.

title: Hotfix: Easy Auth Support
changes: Enabled automatic identity detection for users authenticated via Azure App Service (Easy Auth).
Reduced reliance on client-side login for authenticated sessions.

title: Hotfix: Login Button Reliability
changes: Reverted 'Silent Login' on button click to resolve browser popup blocker issues.
Ensured 'Login' button reliably opens the authentication popup.

title: Hotfix: Silent Login & Robustness
changes: Improved Login flow to attempt silent SSO first.
Prevented 'Interaction in Progress' errors during authentication.

title: Hotfix: Login Visibility
changes: Added explicit 'Login' button in header for unauthenticated users.
Ensured access to Admin/User role information in production.

title: Hotfix: Release Notes Schema
changes: Fixed a schema mismatch in release notes configuration that caused application crash on startup.
Ensured proper loading of Admin User Management features.

title: Admin User Management & UI Overhaul
changes: Simplified Header Design (Pill Buttons)
Unified Status Stack (Environment/DB/Role)
Admin Whitelist Management View
Improved Profile Popover

title: Kontext-Filter for Sourcing Workbench
changes: Implemented the 'Kontext-Filter' (Office, Sector, Service) in the Sourcing Workbench.
Integrated detailed AI enrichment metadata for precision filtering.
Added support for persistent context filters in Saved Views.
Refactored backend search logic for improved performance and consistency.
Enhanced filter UI with collapsible sections and active filter badges.

title: Fix: Timestamp Paradox & Ingestion Stability
changes: Fixed 'Timestamp Paradox' by shifting dashboard ranking filters from creation time to update time.
Refactored Crawler Ingestion to use centralized decoupled persistence logic, ensuring correct database distribution.
Patched diagnostic API endpoints to fix SQLAlchemy 2.0 regressions and restore visibility.
Verified live end-to-end ingestion from TED Germany crawler in staging.

title: Fix: Proxy Argument Alignment
changes: Fixed bug in database proxy layer that caused rerate worker failure.
Verified session safety and diagnostic accuracy in staging environment.

title: Hotfix: Diagnostic Consistency
changes: Fixed regression in diagnostic API endpoint by correcting session lifecycle management.
Ensured consistent database session factory behavior across all domain layers.

title: Hotfix: Connection Lifecycle & Diagnostics
changes: Refactored database iterators to ensure sessions are closed before yielding data, preventing connection leaks during long-running background tasks.
Added diagnostic API endpoints to monitor tender counts and rating status.
Improved error handling in rerate worker to prevent stagnant connections.

title: Hotfix: Rerate Worker Optimization
changes: Optimized background rerate worker to target only unrated tenders, significantly improving performance.
Added database-level filtering for unrated tenders to reduce iteration overhead.
Technical redeploy to trigger processing of newly scraped tenders.

title: Hotfix: Connection Pool Optimization & Deployment Refresh
changes: Fixed SQLAlchemy connection leaks in background workers by refactoring long-running database iterators.
Optimized crawler persistence logic to use batch sessions, reducing database overhead.
Technical redeploy to ensure the latest v1.6.2/v1.6.3 logic is fully active on production.

title: Hotfix: Scoring Worker & Domain Relaxing (Redeploy)
changes: Fixed a crash in the background scoring worker (AttributeError: 'dict' object has no attribute 'id').
Relaxed strict domain regex patterns to prevent rating failures on tenders with valid punctuation (colons, semicolons).
Technical redeploy to ensure fixes are active on production environment.

title: Hotfix: Scoring Worker & Domain Relaxing
changes: Initial attempt to fix background scoring worker crash and relax domain validation.

title: Minor Hotfix: Dashboard Restore
changes: Fixed a database schema mismatch that caused the dashboard to return 500 errors after the 1.6.0 release.
Ensured all tenders are correctly displayed in 'Top Tenders' sections.

title: Mandatory Taxonomy Matching
changes: Refactored AI Enrichment to make Stage 7 (Taxonomy Matching) mandatory.
Integrated detailed semantic descriptions for Sectors and Services into LLM prompts.
Implemented new 'Taxonomy Management' UI for rich category definitions.
Standardized Prompt Template Library with dedicated Label Matching controls.
Enhanced pipeline robustness with validated description-based matching pattern.

title: Keyword Stability & Range
changes: Fixed Keyword Management stability issues (slider modal closing, drag-to-delete).
Added full -5 to +5 scoring range for precise weighting.
Implemented polarity-based type derivation (Negative = Exclusion, Positive = Service).
Enhanced Keyword Trash Zone with custom collision detection.
Re-enabled standard modal close behavior.

title: Release Notes UI Improvement
changes: Moved release notes from static dashboard section to a persistent header modal.
Integrated notification dot on 'Release Notes' button to highlight new updates.
Implemented custom useReleaseNotes hook with LocalStorage tracking.
Utilized Porsche Design System for a premium, accessible modal experience.
Removed legacy release notes from the dashboard for a cleaner user interface.

title: Dashboard Search Tests
changes: Added comprehensive Vitest test infrastructure with jsdom environment.
Implemented 13 unit tests for search filtering logic (case-insensitive, special characters, partial matches).
Implemented 6 component tests for search input functionality.
All 19 tests passing with automated test scripts (npm test, npm run test:ui, npm run test:coverage).
Documented implementation plan and test results for Issue #49.

title: Environment Labeling Standardization
changes: Standardized environment modes: DEVELOPMENT, TESTING, STAGING, PRODUCTION.
Implemented robust backend detection for deployment tiers.
Refactored frontend EnvironmentBadge to use centralized mode detection.
Added support for explicit TESTING environment for QA.
Visual color-coded status badges for different tiers (Red/Caution for Production).

title: Full Text Search & Dashboard Polish
changes: Expanded search engine to include 'full_text' and 'contact_name' fields.
Debounced search input (300ms) for optimized performance.
Relocated search field below the Performance KPI grid.
Removed redundant 'Top Tenders' headline for a cleaner layout.
Consolidated backend ranking logic for better maintainability.
